codeReview.summary: The commit adds `bench/RESULTS.md` with the required M4 transition reducer section, all four specified reducer rows, correct baselines, and delta percentages that are all well within the ≤ +5% regression gate (negative deltas). Transcript skeleton and handoff evidence show the requested gate/benchmark commands were executed and recorded.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker skill directs users to run `bun run bench -- --filter <relevant>`, but the current bench harness ignores filter arguments and still runs all suites, which can repeatedly cause confusion during benchmark-gate features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `bench/index.ts` imports every benchmark file unconditionally before `run()`; the handoff for session `342b562a-1e73-425c-b5a2-363c021dee24` records that `--filter transitions` emitted all suites despite targeted intent.

summary: Reviewed feature `m4-refactor-gate` (commit `5cf855f84b898340ccade01ec146aa8010b6a3a7`): scope and deliverable are satisfied, and no blocking/non-blocking code defects were found in the committed diff. One shared-state skill/harness mismatch was noted for future process hardening.
